General.Name: Zhenro Properties Group Ltd
General.Description: Zhenro Properties Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the development and leasing of properties in the People's Republic of China. The company develops, operates, and manages residential, commercial and mixed-used properties. It also provides management and related services to its commercial and residential properties. Zhenro Properties Group Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
General.Address: Hongqiao Zhenro Center, Building 7, Shanghai, China
